AppSelect
template:
<select
        .value="${this.value}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
        placeholder="${this.placeholder}"
        @change="${this._handleChange}"
      >
        <option value="" disabled selected hidden>${this.placeholder}</option>
        ${parsedOptions.map(
          (option) => html`<option value="${option}">${option}</option>`,
        )}
      </select>
